title: Senior Software Engineer - Microsoft India South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Microsoft India South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Microsoft India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Microsoft India South Asia Partners:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India South Asia Partners!
